channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🛑 Israel and Iran Halt Strikes as Trump Pushes for Ceasefire
item.description: Iran and Israel paused attacks on each other after President Trump urged both sides to "stop shooting." Tehran warned it would resume strikes if Israel continues hitting Hezbollah in Lebanon.

item.title: 🛢️ Iran to Charge Transit Fees for Ships Passing Through Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran's ambassador to Moscow announced the strategic waterway will remain open but under new conditions set by Iran and Oman, including transit fees—a move that could reshape global energy shipping.

item.title: ⚔️ Israel and Iran Trade Strikes, Risking Full-Scale Regional War
item.description: Israel launched airstrikes on central and western Iran after Iranian missile fire, marking the first direct hostilities between the two nations since the April ceasefire.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Declares End to Strikes as Trump Demands Ceasefire on War Day 101
item.description: Iran's military announced it has halted operations against Israel following the first direct exchanges since the April truce, as President Trump pressed both sides to stop fighting.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Netanyahu Defies Trump on Iran, Exposing US-Israel Policy Rift
item.description: President Trump has voiced frustration with Netanyahu over Israel's military actions, but analysts question whether Washington can effectively restrain Israeli operations in the region.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇱🇻⚔️ French jet on NATO mission shoots down drone in Latvian airspace
item.description: A French Rafale fighter jet shot down a drone that entered NATO member Latvia's airspace from Russia, the latest in a series of security incidents along Europe's eastern border.

item.title: 🇷🇺🇦🇲⚠️ Russia warns Armenia of new trade curbs after pro-Western election
item.description: Russia signaled further restrictions on Armenian imports days after PM Pashinyan's election victory reinforced the country's pivot away from Moscow toward the West.

item.title: 🇺🇸🇳🇮 US imposes visa restrictions on Nicaraguans over indigenous leader death
item.description: The United States imposed additional visa restrictions on more than 100 Nicaraguan officials and their families over the death of indigenous leader Brooklyn Rivera.

item.title: 🇰🇷🇰🇵 South Korea's Lee Jae Myung stresses pragmatic North Korea approach
item.description: President Lee Jae Myung said engagement through diplomacy must continue despite inter-Korean tensions, emphasizing a steady hand in dealing with Pyongyang.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇱🇻 French NATO jet shoots down drone in Latvian airspace
item.description: A French Rafale on NATO duty downed a drone that entered from Russia, the latest security incident along Europe's eastern border as Ukraine war intensifies.

item.title: 🚢⚠️ Houthis threaten Israeli shipping in Red Sea after Iran strikes resume
item.description: Yemen's Iran-aligned Houthis banned Israeli-linked vessels from the Red Sea, raising new risks for global shipping and oil markets as the Iran conflict flares.

item.title: ⛪🇪🇸 Pope Leo warns Spain's parliament world is in profound crisis
item.description: In the first papal address to Spain's legislature, Pope Leo condemned war as a "painful defeat" and called for respect for migrants and international law.

item.title: 🇨🇳📦 China exports set for strong May on front-loaded orders and chip demand
item.description: Export growth likely strengthened as firms rushed orders before Gulf war energy impacts, while global semiconductor and AI component demand remained robust.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan-Administered Kashmir Clashes Kill 11 Ahead of Protest Rally
item.description: At least 11 people were killed and more than 70 injured in clashes between protesters and security forces in Pakistan-administered Kashmir ahead of a Tuesday rally called by the banned Joint Awami Action Committee.

item.title: 🇺🇸📡 Amazon Signs Multi-Billion Dollar Deal With Corning for US Fiber Optics Production
item.description: Amazon announced a multi-billion dollar agreement with specialty glass maker Corning to boost US production of optical fiber and connectivity products used in data centers, creating 1,000 jobs in North Carolina.

item.title: 🇪🇺 EU Sanctions IRGC Officials Over Hormuz Blockade Participation
item.description: The European Union imposed sanctions on two Iranian officials and an IRGC unit for their involvement in the Strait of Hormuz blockade, marking the first use of new sanctions powers.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Foils Russian Plot to Assassinate Military Intelligence Official
item.description: Ukraine's National Police detained a suspect allegedly planning to murder Andrii Yusov, spokesperson for Ukraine's military intelligence, in a thwarted assassination plot.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Meets Kim in Pyongyang as North Korea Nuclear Buildup Draws Scrutiny
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping met North Korean leader Kim Jong Un in Pyongyang amid growing international concern over North Korea's nuclear weapons development.

item.title: 🇵🇭 Philippines Earthquake Kills 19, Leaves 12 Missing
item.description: A powerful 7.8-magnitude earthquake struck off the southern coast of the Philippines, killing at least 19 people and leaving 12 missing as landslides damaged buildings.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkish Forces Harass Aircraft Carrying European Defense Ministers to Cyprus
item.description: Cyprus lodged formal complaints after Turkish forces interfered with aircraft carrying Greek, French, and other European defense ministers to the island nation.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Recaptures 600+ sq km of Territory in 2026
item.description: Ukrainian forces have retaken over 600 square kilometers this year, according to military chief Syrskyi, signaling a potential shift in momentum after years of Russian advances.

item.title: 🏛️ IMF Chief Warns World Unprepared for Mounting Crises
item.description: IMF Managing Director Kristalina Georgieva warned that after years of consecutive crises, the global economy remains vulnerable to accumulating shocks, from geopolitical conflicts to economic instability.

item.title: 📉 European Stocks Hit Two-Week Low on Middle East Tensions
item.description: Europe STOXX 600 fell to a two-week low as Middle East escalation and AI stock selloffs weighed on markets, while Italian bank Monte dei Paschi surged on takeover news.

item.title: 🇪🇺 European Leaders Back Ukraine-Russia Ceasefire Talks
item.description: Britain, Germany and France expressed support for direct talks between Zelenskiy and Putin to secure a ceasefire, marking a significant diplomatic push as European leaders coordinate their stance on ending the conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇰🇵 Xi Vows Unwavering Support for North Korea in Rare Summit
item.description: Chinese President Xi Jinping told Kim Jong Un that China will not waver in its support and pledged to work with North Korea to fight hegemony during a rare summit in Pyongyang, underscoring deepening ties between the allies.
